conservative.name: Field Repairs
conservative.requirements: Tools at hand, engaged with target. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before performing this action

success.description: You improvise a repair on a damaged device, building feature, or other item. It's not proper, but desperate times...

sigmarsComet.description: A single numerical trait of the item is improved by 1 while this card is recharging

delay.description: You can't rush these things! The improvements will not come into effect until the start of your next turn, in addition to the normal effects

reckless.name: Field Repairs
reckless.requirements: Tools at hand, engaged with target. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before performing this action

success.description: You improvise a repair on a damaged device, building feature, or other item. It's not proper, but desperate times...

sigmarsComet.description: A single numerical trait of the item is improved by 1 while this card is recharging

exertion.description: Rush a miracle worker and you get a rotten miracle. Remove 1 recharge token from this card
